description: Detects buffer overflow vulnerabilities in C: gets(), strcpy(), strcat(), sprintf(), memcpy() with unchecked size, and scanf() without width limit. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes (cannot filter by function name or check size arguments without #match? predicate support). Precision reduced per D-07.

flag.message: Function call detected -- verify unsafe string functions (gets, strcpy, strcat, sprintf) are not used; use bounds-checked alternatives. Verify memcpy size is checked. Verify scanf uses width specifiers (e.g., %31s).
